metadata.title:
ANKENY REPUBLICANS


ARE SUPPORTING BYRNE

trouble With the Wilson Faction Leads to Desertion of
Boyd.-Union Men Are Appearing in Every


Precinct in the City.

pages.raw_text:
ranks of his personal friends and the
leaders of union labor in the city. At
o'clock this morning the men who
are now on strike in the different
mills held a meeting in Central Labor
hall. They were divided among the
different precincts of the city and
sent out to work. They are the per-
sonal friends Of organized labor and
are to aid in every possible way in
seeing that Mayor Byrne is supported
in his effort to make of Spokane
city that is thoroughly unionized.


BY this means as many as 10 union
men are working at some Of the city
precincts for Mayor Byrne this after
noon. Some of the men are dividing
up the work so that they can work
to the best advantage, and put forth
their energies in the precincts where
they are most needed.


President Alexander Smart Of the
trades council called at the mayors
headquarters in the city hall this
morning and made personal request
that all union workingmen give their
unwavering support to DR.. Byrne.
